name: Typeform
description: Monitor Typeform survey forms for data collection compliance and access management

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Typeform at https://admin.typeform.com
2. Go to your Profile → Developer apps
3. Create a Personal Access Token
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Typeform Profile → Personal Tokens

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Typeform workspace members and their form access

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies Typeform forms are not collecting excessive sensitive data
